message:
docs(readme): add hero illustration to README

Add a centered hero image to the README to improve visual appeal:

- Convert ru_illustration.png (2.2MB) to WebP format (398KB)
- Preserve original resolution (1536x1024) at quality 96
- Add centered <div> container following dcg project style
- Image alt text describes the tool's purpose

The WebP format provides ~82% file size reduction while maintaining
visual quality, making the repo faster to clone and the README
faster to load on GitHub.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
